title: Trends & Choices

studyTools.title: Unit 5 Study Tool
studyTools.blurb: Vocab quiz (20 words), comparatives practice & German traps.

speakingLines: Social media has a big influence on what we buy.
Online shopping is more convenient than going to the mall.
Buying second-hand clothes is better for the environment.
Advertising tries to persuade us to spend more money.
For me, quality is more important than the brand name.
I think we should all consume a little less.
